raw_consumer_statement: I was charged {$100.00} for services which were not rendered. I ordered a tow from XXXX XXXX XXXX on XXXX. They said they needed a card to charge for the tow. No problem. I made it very clear I would not use them if they could not give me a shop to tow. They said they could. I provide my credit card number. The tow truck driver calls a few moments later. He then reports the shop I was told to tow my truck to cant work on my vehicle. I tell him to cancel the tow and was told my card would be charged. The owner texts me days later telling me he thinks he found me a shop to tow my RV to. He thinks. i dispute the charge. I attempted to contact Citi about it. I was not able to provide a statement nor did they reach out to me regarding the matter. Some time later, the owner of the Tow company texts me harassing messages. So i receive no tow, was lied to, and harassed. Citi went a head and sided with the tow company. I did not nor have not received an explanation. I need my {$100.00} back.
